title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 513.230 - When and how to be served
text:
513.230.  When and how to be served. — The notice shall be served as other notices are required to be served by the existing law, at least twenty days before the day of sale, and shall be filed in the office whence the execution issues.
(RSMo 1939 § 1365) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1201; 1919 § 1652; 1909 § 2221
